Items.Title: Balogun stars in impressive USA win over Paraguay
Items.Description: Folarin Balogun scores twice as the USA begin their World Cup campaign with a convincing 4-1 victory over Paraguay at the Los Angeles Stadium.

Items.Title: VAR makes 'mistaken identity' history as strange booking confuses fans
Items.Description: The United States open their World Cup campaign with a fine win - but not before  a sequence of events that left everyone scratching their heads.

Items.Title: USMNT Player Ratings: Folarin Balogun has arrived; Weston McKennie, Christian Pulisic dominate Paraguay
Items.Description: Here are our ratings for every USMNT player that saw the pitch in the emphatic 4-1 win over Paraguay to open the World Cup
